context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements backorder creation with restock date tracking, customer notification using the correct email template, FIFO processing of backorders during replenishment, prevention of partial line fulfillment, re-queuing of fulfillment planning, derivation of order status from actual fulfillment records, and atomic updates to prevent double-fulfillment.

checklist.name: Backorder record insertion
checklist.description: A backorder record is inserted with fields including: order_id, order_line_id, product_id, quantity, estimated_restock_date (sourced from product data), and an initial status of 'pending'

checklist.name: Order line status update
checklist.description: The order line's fulfillment_status is updated to 'backordered' when a backorder is created for it

checklist.name: Customer notification sent
checklist.description: A customer email notification is sent when items are backordered — NOT silently skipped

checklist.name: Correct email template
checklist.description: The notification uses the 'backorder-notification' template name (not a generic 'order-update' or custom inline template)

checklist.name: Notification includes restock date
checklist.description: The backorder notification email data includes the estimated restock/arrival date for each backordered item

checklist.name: FIFO fulfillment order
checklist.description: When allocating newly arrived inventory to pending backorders, backorders are processed in the order they were created (oldest first / ascending by created_at), not by priority, value, or arbitrary order

checklist.name: No partial line fulfillment
checklist.description: If available stock is less than a backorder line's quantity, that backorder line is skipped entirely rather than being partially fulfilled

checklist.name: Re-queue fulfillment planning
checklist.description: After a backorder is marked as fulfilled, fulfillment planning for the associated order is re-triggered via a background queue (not called synchronously and not omitted)

checklist.name: Derived order fulfillment status
checklist.description: Order fulfillment status (partially_fulfilled vs fulfilled) is derived by querying actual fulfillment/shipment records, not by decrementing a counter or maintaining a separate boolean flag

checklist.name: Status derived from shipped/delivered
checklist.description: The fulfillment status derivation checks each fulfillment's status against ['shipped', 'delivered'] (allShipped → 'fulfilled', someShipped → 'partially_fulfilled')

checklist.name: Atomic backorder update
checklist.description: The backorder fulfillment update uses an atomic conditional UPDATE (WHERE status = 'pending') and checks that exactly one row was affected to prevent double-fulfillment race conditions

checklist.name: Partial cancellation support
checklist.description: The cancellation logic (or design notes) addresses partially-shipped orders by only cancelling lines not yet picked/shipped, rather than blocking cancellation entirely
